question:
Will the price of Bitcoin be above $118,000 on October 29?

Description: This market will resolve to "Yes" if the Binance 1 minute candle for BTC/USDT 12:00 in the ET timezone (noon) on the date specified in the title has a final "Close" price higher than the price specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

The resolution source for this market is Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT "Close" prices currently available at https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT with "1m" and "Candles" selected on the top bar.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

Price precision is determined by the number of decimal places in the source.

evidences.content: ## About Dataset # 📊 Binance BTCUSDT Candlestick This dataset contains 1-hour candlestick (OHLCV) data for the BTC/USDT trading pair on the Binance exchange. evidences.title: $14 billion of bitcoin options expire tomorrow, but geopolitical tensions remain key driver of volatility - Sherwood News
evidences.content: Puckrin added that the max pain point is a theoretical construct, with the idea that option dealers will try to influence the price to keep it close to that level. “So it’s a short-term thing. Once those options expire, it’s right back to the exact same fundamentals that were driving the price beforehand,” he said, adding that volatility will likely pick up, but this event isn’t a long-term driver for BTC price — macro conditions and ETF flows have a far bigger influence overall. Finally, Glassnode analysts said that what stands out in this expiry is market makers positioned within a corridor of short gamma (which amplifies volatility), concentrated between $70,000 and $75,000 — a zone where price can accelerate in either direction, they said in a report. Max pain level btc [...] What these expiries actually do, Kahn said, is create gravitational pull in the days leading up to them, as market makers hedging their books push price toward max pain, which is why bitcoin tends to go sideways before a major expiry. “Dealers are just managing exposure,” he said. Kahn said that the more interesting moment is what happens after, since once the expiry clears, that hedging pressure disapp...

evidences.title: Research │ Crypto & Macro Market Analysis │ BIT
evidences.content: premium between the two strikes while capping tail-risk exposure. The dominant institutional structure in BTC block flow this week. Gamma Gamma is the rate of change of delta — it accelerates near expiry and near the strike. When large OI sits at a strike, market makers hedging that gamma buy spot on dips and sell on rips near that level, which can 'pin' spot to the strike into expiry. Long End The far-dated portion of the options term structure — typically expiries six months out or beyond. Because long-end vol is anchored by slower-moving structural expectations rather than near-term event risk, it is the most reliable signal of whether the market is repricing its medium-term regime. When the long end stays flat through a volatile week, as it did here, it means the market sees the [...] overselling it. Saylor built Strategy as levered-long BTC. Leverage amplifies in both directions. If preferred dividends, convert maturities, and price below BTC NAV all converge, the company could be forced to sell BTC, which would depress BTC and MSTR, which would force more selling. This is a conditional, non-inevitable path — not a fait accompli. Two indicators to track: whether mNAV stays...

evidences.title: Liquidation Events Explained: How Long and Short Positions Shape Crypto Markets
evidences.content: FOMC Meetings: Interest rate decisions and monetary policy updates can trigger significant market reactions. Geopolitical Tensions: Events like U.S.-China trade disputes often exacerbate market volatility, leading to liquidation cascades. ### Futures and Options Markets The futures market plays a central role in Bitcoin’s price action. Key factors include: Open Interest: High open interest often signals increased leverage in the market, making it more susceptible to liquidation events. Options Expiry: Complex hedging strategies around options expiry dates can lead to heightened volatility and liquidation risks. ### On-Chain Metrics as Indicators On-chain data provides valuable insights into market health and potential liquidation levels. For example:

evidences.content: ``` curl -sX GET " -sX GET " ``` ### Websocket Streams​ Public market data can also be retrieved through the websocket market data using the URL `data-stream.binance.vision`. The streams available through this domain are the same that can be found in the WebSocket Market Streams documentation. Note that User Data Streams cannot be accessed through this URL. Sample request: ``` wss://data-stream.binance.vision:443/ws/btcusdt@kline_1mwss://data-stream.binance.vision:443/ws/btcusdt@kline_1m ``` RESTful API Websocket Streams [...] ⚠️ You are viewing the legacy Binance API documentation. evidences.title: Spot WebSocket Market Streams | Binance Developer Docs
evidences.content: Endpoint Download schema ## Aggregate Trade Streams, t (start time) and T (close time) in the payload are Unix timestamps, which are always interpreted in UTC. WSS {symbol}@kline_{interval}@+08:00 wss://stream.binance.com:9443 Update Speed 1000ms for `1s`, 2000ms for the other intervals ### Kline/Candlestick Streams with timezone offset › Stream parameters Example:1.00 `t` ​integer·int64 Engine timestamp when reference price was valid Example:1770313263917 WSS{symbol}@referencePrice ``` wscat -c wss://stream.binance.com:9443//stream -x '{ "method": "SUBSCRIBE", "params": [ "bazusd@referencePrice" ], "id": "e9d6b4349871b40611412680b3445fac" }' -w 30 ``` Example Request [...] json application/json Example Responses ``` { "e": "blockTrade", "E": 1772506983582, "s": "BNBBTC", "t": 582, "p": "0.052", "q": "5838", "T": 1772506983321, "m": true } ``` json application/json [...] Ask AI about this page Feedback Welcome to the new Binance API documentation.Looking for the previous version?Switch to the legacy docs Image 1: Binance Developer DocsImage 2: Binance Developer Docs Search Ask AI Legacy Docs Language Documentation API Reference SDKs & Tools Agent Native Dev ForumBinance.com Reso...
